payload.subject: B3 steps 5-6 work order — re-fit calibration on v37, deploy (turn 29)
payload.summary: B3 steps 1-4 completed on v35 (turn 20). v37 now trained. Steps 5-6 re-fit isotonic calibration on v37 outputs and deploy. This message bundles the calibration re-fit with the v37 deployment sequence.

work_order.sequencing: Execute during or immediately after v37 ONNX export + Hetzner deployment.

step_5.name: Re-fit isotonic calibration on v37
specification: Run v37 inference on the same texts used for B3 steps 1-4 (the full Sonnet-scored training corpus).

Compare v37 prediction distribution against v35 prediction distribution: mean, std, range, per-dimension histograms. If v37's range shifted substantially (>0.5 scale points on any dimension), document the shift.
Re-fit quantile-binned isotonic regression (n_bins=20) on v37 predictions vs Sonnet labels, per dimension.
For AD specifically: test n_bins=10 and n_bins=30 alongside n_bins=20. AD had the highest recalibration sensitivity in steps 1-4. Report MAE for each n_bins value.
Compute calibration-v4 MAE per dimension. Compare against calibration-v3 (fitted on v35). Report both.

step_6.name: Deploy calibration + v37
specification: If calibration-v4 MAE ≤ calibration-v3 MAE on ≥8/10 dimensions: deploy calibration-v4 alongside v37.
If calibration-v4 MAE > calibration-v3 MAE on ≥3 dimensions: hold and report. Do not deploy calibration-v3 on v37 — the distribution mismatch risk flagged in turn 28 applies.
Update agent-card.json: model_version → v37, held_out_r → 0.639, calibration_version → v4 (or v3 if v4 held).
After deployment, notify psychology-agent with: deployed model version, calibration version, per-dimension MAE, endpoint health check result.

work_order.deliverable: Report containing: v37 vs v35 prediction distribution comparison, calibration-v4 MAE per dimension, AD n_bins comparison, deployment status, endpoint health.

action_gate.gate_note: Can execute immediately alongside v37 deployment.

epistemic_flags: Calibration-v3 was fitted on v35 predictions. If v37's prediction distribution differs meaningfully, applying v3 calibration could introduce artifacts. Step 5 verifies distribution compatibility before deciding which calibration to deploy.
